title: Phase 3.5: Local Mode - Epic
body:
## Overview

Phase 3.5 returns code-reviewer to its original local-first vision, decoupling the review engine from GitHub Actions I/O.

**Design Document:** `docs/design/05-PHASE-3.5-LOCAL-MODE.md`

## Motivation

Primary use case: Review PRs in GitHub Enterprise repositories where setting up the GitHub Action isn't feasible. Secondary benefits:
- Faster iteration during development (no push-wait-review cycle)
- Review any public/accessible repo without owner cooperation
- Foundation for coding assistant-driven review workflows

## Sub-phases

- [ ] **3.5a** Remote PR Review - `cr review pr owner/repo#N` #174
- [ ] **3.5b** Session Storage - Local state tied to repo+branch #175
- [ ] **3.5c** Interactive TUI - Select/edit findings before posting #176
- [ ] **3.5d** MCP Review Tools - `review_pr`, `post_findings` tools #177
- [ ] **3.5e** Streaming & Polish - UX improvements #178

## Success Criteria

1. Can review any accessible GitHub PR without Actions setup
2. Can select/edit findings before posting
3. Local reviews persist across runs until branch deleted
4. Coding assistant can invoke reviews via MCP
5. TUI is intuitive and responsive
